summary: Iteration 4 (instant-reply notifications + Simulate-reply demo + Send test check-in per parent + multilingual 3D landing) end-to-end tested. Backend: 52/52 pytest tests pass (42 regression + 10 new — text 1/2/3 → good/okay/not_well; Telugu బాగున్నా → good, ఒంట్లో బాలేదు → not_well; num_media > 0 → is_voice; 'help pain' → emergency reply with keywords in GET /replies; parent-scoped list with parent_name; 404 for non-owned parent; scoping across owners). Frontend: Landing renders WebGL canvas from Scene3D and hero, and language switcher toggles EN/HI/TE for hero H1, nav (How/Pricing), pricing, FAQ, footer; localStorage 'ayana_lang' updates on click; data-lang attribute on root updates for Noto font mapping. Dashboard Replies tab: replies-list shows existing 2 items (voice + not_well with 😟 emoji), Simulate a reply dialog opens with sim-parent/sim-options/sim-text/sim-send; clicking '🚨 Emergency' quick option sets sim-text to 'help pain'; Simulate → new reply appears with 🚨, parent name 'Amma', body '"help pain"'; Replies badge count goes 2 → 3 and remains after tab switch. Parents tab: Send test button opens SendTestDialog with send-test-category select + send-test-confirm; confirming for Amma (+917032538448, joined to Twilio sandbox) returned LIVE Twilio 'sent' status and toast 'Sent to Amma on WhatsApp ✓' (verified end-to-end).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py parse_reply(): _BAD is checked before _GOOD, which is correct (so 'not well' beats 'good' substring). But the current order of checks does an early 'return' on first match, and _GOOD uses either t == kw or (kw in t). If a message contains both 'not well' AND 'good' it will resolve to not_well first — matches the intent. Fine as-is.

server.py _record_reply / _notify_family: emergency notification does not include voice info, and if both is_voice=True AND emergency, only emergency head is sent (correct priority) — no bug, just noting.
server.py POST /replies/simulate does not gate on plan (Care+/Basic both can call); acceptable — Simulate is a testing/demo helper. Not a bug.
server.py POST /replies/simulate silently succeeds even if plan restricts replies count; no rate limit — acceptable for demo tool.
Landing.js scroll listener never uses `progress.current` in a subscribed way beyond passing the ref into Scene3D. Verified via manual scroll — Scene3D reads the ref inside its own r3f loop. Fine.
translations.js: hi.trust.quote2by contains Latin 'New Jersey' while te.trust.quote2by has Telugu 'న్యూజెర్సీ'. Consistency nit — cosmetic only.
Iteration 3 'Finish setup for members' bug is FIXED: Dashboard.js line 84 now gates on `!user?.household_owner_id` so members no longer see the Finish setup CTA (verified in code).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_replies_and_i18n.py (new — 10 tests for reply parsing, emergency events, replies list scoping)

success_rate.frontend: 100% for iteration-4 flows (landing 3D + i18n switching EN/HI/TE, Replies tab, Simulate dialog with all quick options, Send test dialog with LIVE Twilio delivery to +917032538448)

UI simulate added 1 emergency reply for Amma. Identifiable by TEST_/rep_/c_ email prefixes and 'help pain' body.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests: /app/backend/tests/test_ayana_api.py (22 regression) + /app/backend/tests/test_circle_and_send.py (12 iter3) + /app/backend/tests/test_replies_and_i18n.py (10 iter4) = 52 tests, xdist=2, ~18s. LIVE WhatsApp: only +917032538448 (Amma under owner1@example.com) returns 'sent'; every other number returns 'failed' from Twilio — EXPECTED. Landing i18n via LanguageProvider + translations.js; state stored in localStorage 'ayana_lang'. data-testid list: lang-switcher, lang-switcher-en/te/hi, tab-replies, replies-list, replies-empty, simulate-reply, sim-parent, sim-options, sim-text, sim-send, send-test-<parentId>, send-test-category, send-test-confirm. Owner1 has onboarding_complete=False so /login redirects to /onboarding; navigate directly to /dashboard to test replies/parent flows.
